For just the chance to win your heart

snippet.title: SENG ADA KABAR  - JUSTY ALDRIN ft HENDRI TALLANE
snippet.description:
Title : SENG ADA KABAR
Artist : Justy Aldrin & Hendri Tallane
Written by : Justy Aldrin & Hendri Talane
Prod by PAM
Directed by BelgyApriliandy 
Edited by Belgy Apriliandy
Executive Prod. Eriska April 

Support by VIBE INDONESIA and Brutal Collection

Dangke banya Tuhan Yesus , Istri tercinta Eriska dan anak2 terkasih Jane dan Raisa , dan keluarga yang selalu support beta dalam keadaan apapun ,  dangke banya buat semua orang yang terlibat dalam lagu ini khususnya buat beta pung ade HENDRI TALLANE yang sangat terbaik kalo tulis lirik , dan untuk pasukan jogja keluarga besar BRUTAL COLLECTION Kaka Toton , Kaka Jac Zeran, Kaka Rise One , Om Aje , Kaka Moche , Ade Fezz , Epet , Muel . 
Semoga lagu ini bisa sampai ke hati setiap pendengar . 

SENG ADA KABAR

Su lama seng ada kabar 
Nona ale dimana
Lama seng dengar suara

Su lama seng bakudapa
Nona skarang se deng sapa
Ada bae bae ka disana

Su jauh .. tapele
Orang laeng su ambe
Su jauh .. tapele
Biar mo bilang apa lai nona cuma se sandiri

Su coba ulang kali beta tahan rasa biar tong seng pisah
Muka mo taruh dimana kalo orang tau katong su sama sama
Sio sampe jua tuang hati e
Jujur bt masih paleng sayang se paleng sayang

Luka kanapa pigi tanpa alasan
Badai deng ombak masa seng bisa lawan
Se putar bale kastinggal samua par jadi kenangan

Badan ni jatuh malele
Rasa seng bisa parlente
Beta masih tunggu kabar dari ale

Nama Game : Dig Deeper For Brainrots
Link Game : https://www.roblox.com/games/84514721527976

🔰 Sekarang kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat VOICE di Room Santuy yang ada di Discord. Jadwal ga tentu, tapi biasanya kalau sore sekitar jam 15.30 - 16.30 WIB. Baca lagi bagian bawah biar kalian benar-benar mengerti 🗿

Sebelum JOIN, tolong baca ini ya 🙏😁

✅ PENTING!! Ikut MABAR atau RECORD mungkin agak susah karena ramai yang tungguin bang Hayo, sedangkan game Roblox server-nya terbatas

✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya
✅ Kadang bang Hayo harus pakai LINK PRIVATE SERVER biar record-nya lebih lancar. Kirim link-nya di Discord & untuk cara JOIN baca di cara-ikut-record yang ada di Discord
✅ Baca PERATURAN GROUP & PERTANYAAN UMUM  di Discord untuk kepentingan bersama
✅ Di group ini kalian juga bisa mencari KAWAN yang mungkin cocok sama kalian dan bisa main bareng. Ga perlu fokus sama bang Hayo saja karena bang Hayo ga mampu standby 24 jam
✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

🔰 Bang, kenapa ga bisa chat di Discord?
Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

Bang Hayo sudah jelasin secara lengkap di Discord. Cari saja di channel cara-ikut-record biar kalian paham. Lalu, akun yang umurnya kurang dari 13 tahun akan agak sulit buat join karena peraturan terbaru Roblox

👤 Artista | Katy Perry
💿 Canción | The One That Got Away
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 27/12/2022
🔊 Géneros Musicales | Pop

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
"The One That Got Away" de Katy Perry es una historia nostálgica sobre ese amor que marcó tu vida pero que, por decisiones o circunstancias, se perdió para siempre. La canción mezcla recuerdos juveniles con arrepentimiento, mostrando cómo incluso con éxito y dinero, hay cosas —como el tiempo y las personas— que no se pueden recuperar.

📲 Sígue a "Katy Perry" en:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/katyperry/

🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jostland_/

🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iamjostland
📬 Contacto Directo por Instagram: @jostland_

🎶 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🎶

[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away (The one that got away)

[Post-Chorus]
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away
